violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. At the time of inspection, the PIC stated Food Safety Certificate has expired. PIC to renew and apply for RIDOH CFP Food Safety Manager License as soon as possible. Per the PIC, class has been signed up for and will submit CFSM Paperwork to the RIDOH CFP as soon as successfully completed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen dish machine. Call was made for thermo-labels at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. At the time of inspection, the PIC stated Food Safety Certificate has expired. PIC to renew and apply for RIDOH CFP Food Safety Manager License as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

At the time of inspection, the shellfish tags were observed not being kept properly. Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order with the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. Proper storage of shellfish tags reviewed with PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly in the walk-in cooler to prevent cross-contamination (Seafood stored over Beef). Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Proper storage of raw animal food items was reviewed with the PIC. Foods were rearranged properly at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

The following utensils were observed being stored improperly at the time of inspection... - Ice Cream Scoops were observed being stored in stagnant water (Water dumped out at the time of inspection) - The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. - A scoop was observed being stored in dry ingredient(s) with the handle in the food item. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Scoop repositioned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the following and observed to be lacking a sealed, nonabsorbent coating... - Wooden shelving in the kitchen area - Wooden wall support for the potato slicer in the basement prep area Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2024

The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen dish machine. Call was made for thermo-labels at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the bar dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following equipment were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris... - Cookline equipment (surfaces between equipment/wall) - Potato slicer Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2024

Then following non-sewage drain lines were observed to be improperly draining...The waste from the Bar Beer Tap System is draining into a container (old plastic jugs). - The drain line hooked up to the pump used to transfer condensate liquid from the ice machine to a drain was observed draining into the prep sink.Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain.The condensate from the ( ) refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair...- The floor in the downstairs prep area was observed to have a sealed coating that is worn/peeling/chipped- The floor/wall coving in the basement prep area near the ice machine and dish area was observed to be peeled/missing- The metal wall covering near the fryolators in the kitchen area was observed to have a bent seem exposing the subsurfacePhysical facilities are to be maintained in good repair.The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024
